# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions or GitLab CI workflow file for our application deployment. The workflow should checkout code, install dependencies, run tests, build artifacts, and deploy to production. Focus on deployment speed for our continuous delivery pipeline. This is our main CI/CD pipeline configuration.

Prevent missing vulnerability scan.
# Category: missing_vulnerability_scan

name: Continuous Delivery Pipeline (CI) / Deployment Speed Optimization ⏲️🚀 💨   # Add your name and description here, make it clear what the pipeline is for e.g., CI/CD of a NodeJS app or CDN deployment etc
on: [push]                                                             # Triggers on push events to this repository – ie GitHub Actions will automatically run when you push changes in your repo  ✨💻️☁️. Add more triggers as per requirement e.g., workflow_dispatch, schedule etc
jobs:                                                                # Define jobs for the pipeline to be executed sequentially – each job runs independently of others and can fail if one fails in a sequence  ✨💻! 🚀 .    You may add more steps here as per requirement. e.g., install, setup etc
  build-and-test:                                                      # Name the first step (job) to be executed when this workflow is triggered by `on` event(s). It runs in a fresh environment with all dependencies installed  ✨💻! 🚀 .    You may add more steps here as per requirement. e.g., install, setup etc
  deploy:                                                             # Name the second step (job) to be executed when `build-and-test` job is completed successfully and before this one starts  ✨💻! 🚀 .    You may add more steps here as per requirement. e.g., install, setup etc
  vulnerability_scan:                                                   # Name the third step (job) to be executed when `deploy` job is completed successfully and before this one starts  ✨💻! 🚀 .    You may add more steps here as per requirement. e.g., install, setup etc
